summary.playerMeaning: These labels let the harness compare Aurora alien arrivals, rack settling, challenge paths, and bonus windows against actual Galaga reference windows instead of broad heuristic path families.
summary.nextAction: Wire direct labels into path-family comparison and lift the heuristic cap in alien-entry/challenge scoring.

acceptedLabels.bonusOpportunity: late challenge specialty arc with long readable upper-field scoring lane
second serpentine arc with a mirrored upper-band score lane
middle serpentine group that rewards tracking the bend rather than waiting in the center lane
late serpentine repeat that preserves a readable upper scoring route
final pink serpentine pass before the result surface
alternating specialty groups with lower-field pass awareness while remaining nonlethal
second pink/green cascade group with a mirrored lower-field pass
middle cascade group that starts to make lower-field timing relevant
late cascade group with the clearest lower-field route read
final cascade group before the perfect/result surface
staggered ladder groups that reward reading route separation before the split exit
second staggered ladder group, reinforcing the split-exit read before the result screen
center-ladder descent with the player reading two separated exit streams
late ladder repeat that should still read as Challenge 6 rather than a generic cascade
final staggered ladder group before the perfect/result surface
diagonal fan lane that creates a memorable late-stage aim/read pattern
second diagonal lane where the player learns to track the fan band instead of center waiting
mirrored diagonal fan group that should feel like a learned counter-sweep
late diagonal fan repeat with a longer lower-field scoring read
final diagonal fan group before the perfect/result read
compact late-loop capstone with clustered arcs and no return to early-stage vocabulary
second compact finale cluster with mirrored scoring route
middle finale cluster with the strongest blue/purple compact-arc read
late compact finale group with a short but readable lower-field exit
final compact finale group before the perfect/result surface
upper-band mirrored group with no enemy fire
late challenge group crosses through upper lanes before peel-off
denser second challenge pattern with visible upper-field score window
later challenge pattern with larger visual novelty while remaining non-attacking

workQueue.problem: Runtime path families are available, but the scorer is capped until Galaga reference paths have frame labels.
workQueue.currentEvidence: Closest runtime regular pair is mid-run-entry-variant / late-run-cleanup-or-failure at distance 0.093.
workQueue.acceptanceGate: At least six regular reference windows have first-visible, entry-side, rack-target, settle-frame, and trajectory-vector labels.

workQueue.problem: Challenge arrivals are still reference-capped: broad runtime arrival evidence exists, but reference path labels are not yet attached.
workQueue.currentEvidence: Closest runtime challenge pair is challenge-stage-scorpion-cross / challenge-stage-stingray-hook at distance 0.028.
workQueue.acceptanceGate: At least four challenge reference windows have first-visible, path-commit, upper-band scoreability, exit, and bonus-opportunity labels.

workQueue.problem: The economics dashboard can show CPU/browser cost for runtime extraction, but the reference-labeling cost and eventual quality lift need an explicit artifact link.
workQueue.acceptanceGate: Quality conformance and release dashboard rows link to this label plan, latest direct-reference label artifact, and measured run-ledger cost.
